subcodes.first_line: This evanescent servant, whenever he desireth to offer praise and thanksgiving, it is as though from all his limbs and members [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این خادم فانی هر هنگام اراده حمد و ثنا مینماید کانه از جمیع اعضا و اجزایش
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
